> Generated for `@gravity-ui/expresskit@2.8.0`

# ExpressKit

> Lightweight express.js wrapper that integrates with NodeKit.
>
> **npm:** `@gravity-ui/expresskit` — check the installed major version in the user's `package.json` and read docs matching it.

> Note: this package's README does not yet have a `## For AI agents` section. See the [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gravity-ui/expresskit/main/README.md) for full documentation.

## Peer dependencies

Install these in the host project at a compatible version:

| Package | Version range |
| --- | --- |
| `@gravity-ui/nodekit` | `^1.6.0 || ^2.0.0` |
